title: solanum aculeastrum subsp. thomsonii
intro: Solanum aculeastrum subsp. thomsonii, also known as Thomson's nightshade or Solanum thomsonii, is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family, Solanaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of East Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating pain. Solanum aculeastrum subsp. thomsonii can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, including a tincture, decoction, or infusion, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
